creator: decke@bluelife.at
text:
On Thu, 4 Feb 2010 17:50:09 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of dns/maradns,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/143559 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/143559

Thanks for the patch! I've tested it and it solves the reported problem.
